a: A Section 8 non-profit company working across the tribal belt of Dumka, Pakur, Godda and Sahibganj in Jharkhand, India.
We are registered under NITI Aayog DARPAN (JH/2025/0860947). Tax-exemption certificates will be shared as they are issued.
Visit the Join Us page and send us your details. We welcome volunteers across all our programs.
Funds support education, environment and livelihood programs in rural Jharkhand. See the Progress page for updates.
